traits.name: Diminished Form (Campaign Variant)
traits.text: If the party interrupted the shard ritual in Chapter 2 Scene 2-2, Malgrath begins this encounter at 68 HP (half maximum) and cannot use Legendary Resistances. If the ritual completed, he uses full statistics.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.text: If Malgrath fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Rejuvenation
traits.text: If Malgrath is destroyed while his phylactery-stone remains intact on the dais, he regains a new body in 1d10 days. The phylactery-stone (AC 5, 40 HP, immunity to poison and psychic damage) must be destroyed while Malgrath is at 0 HP to permanently kill him.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.text: Malgrath is an 18th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). He has the following spells prepared — Cantrips: chill touch, mage hand, prestidigitation; 1st (4 slots): magic missile, shield; 2nd (3 slots): darkness, misty step; 3rd (3 slots): counterspell, dispel magic, fly; 4th (3 slots): blight, dimension door; 5th (3 slots): cone of cold, scrying; 6th (1 slot): disintegrate; 7th (1 slot): finger of death; 8th (1 slot): power word stun; 9th (1 slot): power word kill.

traits.name: Turn Resistance
traits.text: Malgrath has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
actions.text: Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (3d6) cold damage. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

actions.name: Ashen Bolt (Cantrip — Chill Touch)
actions.text: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 120 ft., one creature. Hit: 18 (4d8) necrotic damage. Until the start of Malgrath's next turn, the target can't regain hit points.
